An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
What did you notice?

Jin observes calmly.
Many insects have six legs.
Some insects go through metamorphosis.
An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
What did you notice?

Jin studies a ice.
Jin observes calmly.
Water freezes at zero degrees celsius.
Ice is less dense than liquid water.
An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
What did you notice?

Jin studies a gravity.
Jin observes calmly.
Gravity pulls objects toward earth.
Heavier objects still fall at the same rate.
An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
What did you notice?

Mina observes clearly.
Plants use sunlight to make food.
The process also releases oxygen.
An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
What did you notice?

An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.

A question asks why it happens.

What did you notice?

A magnet pulls some metals.
Iron is attracted to magnets.
An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
Why do you think that happens?

Ravi studies a moon.
Ravi observes calmly.
The moon moves around earth.
Moonlight is reflected sunlight.
An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
Why do you think that happens?

Warm air can hold water vapor.
Cool air can form clouds.
An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
Why do you think that happens?

Ada studies a magnet.
Ada observes calmly.
A magnet pulls some metals.
Iron is attracted to magnets.
An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.

A test can compare two cases.
Why do you think that happens?

An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
What would change if one detail changed?

A question asks why it happens.

A question asks why it happens.

An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
What would change if one detail changed?

Water and warmth help it sprout.
An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
What would change if one detail changed?

Warm air can hold water vapor.
Cool air can form clouds.
An observation tells what we notice.
A question asks why it happens.
A test can compare two cases.
Explain it back in your own words.

A test can compare two cases.
Explain it back in your own words.

A question asks why it happens.

Explain it back in your own words.
